Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about your journey to a healthier, more confident smile. If you can't find your answer here, we're just a phone call away.

General

What is D' Lux Premium Dental Clinic?

We combine advanced big-city technology with small-town values. Our approach focuses on both clinical excellence and patient comfort, offering everything from routine cleanings to complex reconstructions under one roof.

Do you treat children?

Where are you located?

Do you have personal staff?

What is your cancellation policy?

What are your office hours?
